scripts.test: cargo test && pnpm run lint && pnpm --filter dslinter test && pnpm --filter dslint-demo run build
scripts.release:major: pnpm run test && pnpm exec changelogen --release --major --dir packages/dashboard && pnpm --filter dslinter publish
scripts.release:minor: pnpm run test && pnpm exec changelogen --release --minor --dir packages/dashboard && pnpm --filter dslinter publish
scripts.release:patch: pnpm run test && pnpm exec changelogen --release --patch --dir packages/dashboard && pnpm --filter dslinter publish
